description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with exaggeratedly long, outstretched arms that extend horizontally far beyond the body, resembling wings or a balancing pose. The figure has a slender build and is dressed in fitted, modern clothing, including a jacket, pants, and boots. The head is small and round, with minimal facial detail, and the posture suggests a dynamic, almost acrobatic stance. The arms are the most prominent feature, appearing almost flat and blade-like, giving the impression of flight or extreme balance. The figure carries a small, visible pouch or accessory attached to the waist. The overall appearance is both artistic and slightly surreal, making the figure stand out in an urban environment.
description: A stylized adult figure with extremely long, outstretched arms, dressed in modern fitted clothing and boots, posed as if balancing or gliding. The figure has a slender build and carries a small pouch at the waist.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the outstretched arms, the face, and the frontal details of the clothing and pouch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the arms, the profile of the head, and the leg and boot details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the jacket, and the arms extending outward from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, with similar arm, leg, and boot details as view 1.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted jacket and pants with boots and a waist pouch
